reviews.author: Amita Bavra
reviews.review_body: A good positive vibes school loved it ! But the problem is to not take admission because of A.C , they ask for 8000 rupees for A.C this is not ok ! You should provide A.C no fees charge for installation or buying it's your responsibility, we can give 1000 for month only not for installation, when I see my child coming from school I feel bad , he always sweat ! Very bad !!! But school is good !" But that one teacher I didn't like - is Mr Praveen Bansal many of student told me about him , his nature is not good !" For especially girl , a humble request remove him from school !! 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏 remove him otherwise don't take admission in that school , parents be secure , this is not good.🙏🙏🙏🙏

reviews.author: Shweta Panchal
reviews.review_body: Amazing school with great experienced teachers. Students are making brilliant progress in academics and extra curricular activities. This is really a nice place for your child for education.

reviews.author: Swati Laal
reviews.review_body: I would like to acknowledge that Sanfort World School owes much of its reputation to the unwavering dedication and diligence of Arvind sir. He has been an integral pillar of the institution, very simple very humble down to earth, contributing significantly to its success. With his departure, uncertainty prevails, and we can only hope that the school will continue to thrive in the absence of his valuable presence. Wishing the school and its community the very best for the future. We will miss you Sir 💐☺️

reviews.author: surabhi chadha
reviews.review_body:
This school is doing a wonderful job kids are enjoying Print rich and colourful classroom literacy environments offer a plethora of accessible materials students can use as they develop their literacy skills.
They are beautiful and eye catching as well. Teacher are very friendly and my child is enjoying his journey with this school.
Regards

reviews.author: Morino D'Souza
reviews.review_body:
If you are planning to consider this school for the admission of your child, please DONT. I am an existing parent of this school and sharing my ongoing experience so that you take a better decision for your child.

1. School has a policy that class teacher will never call parents and Parents can never call class teacher to discuss anything about the child. Even then if parents call class teacher, they do not pick the call.

2. Class teacher writes incomplete homework in diary that too once a week
On asking about the homework of rest of the books they say you have to turn over the pages and find it on your own.

3. In school bus, more than 50% of the days the assigned teacher will be absent. There are no phone numbers maintained of parents in the school bus. The teacher in the bus always on the phone

4. School has a mandate to buy all books, school bag, uniform from the school. The quality of the school bag and uniform is very poor and for just one shirt school is charging 500-600 rupees.

6. Class teacher wrongly checks the work done by children.

7. Class teacher shows zero involvement with children. Once we went to school to personally talk to class teacher, she came only for 2 minutes. Means even if you visit the school you can't guarantee that you will get to meet the class teacher.

8. Existing parent is never allowed to meet principal.
